title: Add invalid source address and bad type ICMPv6 malformed vectors
description: Create test vectors for invalid IPv6 source (e.g. multicast) and bad ICMP type. Follow schema with category:malformed, expect_error, hex wire format. Reference RFC 4443 independent oracles.
close_reason: Added the two ICMPv6 malformed test vectors to schc_compression.json with RFC 4443 references, updated description/README, validated with custom test script. No subbeads created.
